customAttributes.description:
Please Note: This printing of Collected Company features a metallic Top 8 stamp commemorating a Store Championship Top 8 win, and a Store Name. The Store Name on the card you will receive will be RANDOM For a non-randomized version of this Store Championship Promo, please shop Listings with Photos.

Look at the top six cards of your library. Put up to two creature cards with mana value 3 or less from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

details.setUrlName: Game Day and Store Championship Promos
